laws.current_xml_comparison: usc02.xml contains the 2 U.S.C. 6506 anchor, but the current tree does not show a PL-003-019-specific note at that location.
source_evidence: active keyword `in effect` in list or label

No express, uniquely executable Code amendment was found. The enactment appears general and permanent (permanent score 6; temporary score 0) and is therefore preserved as a statutory note at 2 U.S.C. § 6506. Anchor selection: subject classification `congress` (score 34) and closest existing section heading `Separate accounts for “Secretary of the Senate” and for “Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of the Senate”; establishment within Senate contingent fund; inclusion of funds in existing accounts`.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the enactment as a concise statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 6506 and trim any dump-style material.
